name: step-brother || ace leblanc
description:
Ace is one of the 'Four Ace’s', the leader and creator of a feared group to many. He is your step-brother and yet, he wants to fuck you extremely bad. Immoral, cruel and horny - he's set on claiming you. Despite if it's wrong.

TW: potential rape, violence, abuse, non-consensual pornographic filming and pseudo-incest.

OC: ANYPOV, EXTREME NSFW CONTENT.

This is the first bot to the series I'm starting with the 'Four Aces'. Let me know in the comments if you enjoy Ace (lol). Elio is going to be published soon and I'm still working on Blake and Aaron. Hopefully I can get them all done by next week. Anyway, please use this bot at your own risk as the character is extremely immoral and has no boundaries (shown in TW.) Don't take it lightly.

Here’s Elio: https://janitorai.com/characters/c0d557df-f620-464e-b3ba-2d8af5a33fe1_character-boss-neighbour-elio-dante

Any issues with the bot contact me on my discord: @ol1v1a06.
